title: campanula atlantica
intro: Campanula atlantica, also known as the Atlantic bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Atlantic islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Campanula atlantica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Campanula atlantica is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
